screens.title: Admin Login
screens.notes: Centered auth card, clear field validation, primary CTA prominence.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.notes: 4 stats cards on desktop, 2x2 on tablet, stacked on mobile.

screens.title: Brands List
screens.notes: Desktop/tablet table; mobile card-list with same data columns mapped to key/value rows.

screens.title: Brand Editor - New
screens.notes: Split layout desktop, stacked layout tablet/mobile.

screens.title: Brand Editor - Edit
screens.notes: Shows populated media previews and delete/remove image actions.

screens.title: Blog List
screens.notes: Status chips for published/draft and quick filters.

screens.title: Blog Editor - New
screens.notes: Main content area + right metadata rail; mobile collapses to sections.

screens.title: Blog Editor - Edit
screens.notes: Includes existing cover image and publish toggle in active state.

screens.title: Inspirations
screens.notes: Grid with reorder affordance; mobile uses drag handles per card.

screens.title: Inquiries
screens.notes: Header with CSV export and per-row detail action.

screens.title: Inquiry Details Modal
screens.notes: Modal overlays inquiries list frame with dimmed backdrop.

screens.title: Settings
screens.notes: Grouped cards: hero, about, contact/social, homepage sections ordering.

screens.title: Admin Layout Shell
screens.notes: Master frame used as base for all admin screens.

behaviorNotes: Primary actions stay in top-right header for list screens.
Destructive actions require danger style and confirm surface.
On mobile, table-heavy screens transform into cards, preserving all fields.
